productDisplayName: Nike Boys Black & White Reversible T-shirt
description: Composition Black and white reversible sleeveless T-shirt for boys made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has white panels on the armholes and an appliquéd nike swoosh on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations A summer staple from nike perfect for boys, this piece is sure to become an off-duty favourite in your fashion focused sportswear collection. Crafted for sport and fashioned to look great, Nike gets it right with this versatile piece. Style this with sport shoes and track pants when you're out exercising, or with your favourite jeans and slip-on shoes for a casual look.
